title: satureja cuneifolia subsp. gracilis
intro: Satureja cuneifolia subsp. gracilis, also known as mountain savory, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to the mountainous regions of southern Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of mountain savory include its ability to alleviate digestive problems, reduce respiratory infections, and improve mental clarity. The herbal preparations of Satureja cuneifolia subsp. gracilis include tea, essential oil, and infusions, which can be used for culinary, medicinal, and aromatherapeutic purposes.
